ddls:
CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result entry */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office for which the candidate is running */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District number (if applicable) */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the political party */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the candidate */,
  "election_day_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received on election day */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes received */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes (sum of election day, absentee, and early votes) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the precinct */,
  "precinct_type" TEXT /* Type of precinct (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the political party */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office for which the candidate is running */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District number (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)
